# SamplingValidation.IsClientModifiableRequestField method

Returns `true` when *field* is one the client MAY modify/omit (§21.2.10-e). Mirrors TS `isClientModifiableRequestField`.

```csharp
public static bool IsClientModifiableRequestField(string field)
```

| --- | --- |
| field | The field name. |

## Return Value

`true` when modifiable.
